text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One afternoon, Fine Motion and Air Groove have
a photo shoot in their signature racewear for a
feature article in the academy newspaper.

text_block_list.name: Academy Newspaper Member
text_block_list.text:
Fine, Air Groove, could you look a little more in
this direction, please?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay. How's this?

text_block_list.name: Academy Newspaper Member
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! You two were definitely the right people
to ask for our feature on "dignified signature
racewear"!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's nothing. I'm glad that you're satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, didn't you once say your
signature wear was a testament to your feelings?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion nods with a smile. It's just like the
very first time she donned her signature
racewear...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What do you think? Does it suit me?
choice_data_list:
It looks absolutely great on you.
Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thanks, Trainer. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if you really like it that much, should we get
you a jacket with the same design?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion keeps teasing me as we make our
way to the press conference we called to reveal
her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being a foreign dignitary, even the completion of
Fine Motion's signature racewear is major news,
and the press shows up in droves.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It is through the enduring support of so many
others that I have the honor of donning this
signature racewear today.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wish to express my deep gratitude to both my
loving fans and all others who have helped me
along the way.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Would you mind sharing your
future aspirations with us?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I will endeavor to run with everything I have and
without vanity, so as to bring honor to Ireland.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What do you say to those who believe your
devotion to running might have a negative impact
on the performance of your public duties?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Please take a look at my signature racewear.
There are shamrocks inlayed in several places,
which represent promises.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This racewear symbolizes my oath to Ireland and
is also a testament to my own feelings.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My pride, my ideals I wish to illustrate, the future
I walk—all of these things are forever intertwined
with my home.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ireland has never once left my mind, and will ever
be in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I will continue to devote my full abilities to
this endeavor. I wish to do the people proud,
both as a racer and as a representative of Ireland
on this international stage.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It is only natural for some to harbor concerns, but
that is all the more reason to watch me run and
ascertain my resolve for yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I won't lose! My feelings... My pride... won't allow
it!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Incredible! She's right at the heels of the Empress!

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
I'll be honest—I thought she was just some rich
girl doing this for thrills, but she might be the real
deal!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...I believe I've done all I can. We have a saying in
English, and I think you have a similar one in
Japan: "We propose, the gods dispose."
choice_data_list: I'm sure everyone felt your determination!
You were even cooler than usual.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, let's hope so.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
From our birth and environment to our
preferences and beliefs—no two people are alike.
That's why I'm sure it'll be difficult to gain
everyone's understanding.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But if my feelings are able to reach even one of
you watching this press conference today, I'll be
happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It appears the photo shoot finished smoothly
while I was taking my stroll down memory lane.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Here you are, Trainer! Here, I've got a present for
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm honored to hear you say that. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
When I put this signature racewear on, it's like my
whole body tenses. I feel like it's driving me
onwards.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I have to show everyone that I'm not
playing around!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It appears the photo shoot finished smoothly
while I was taking my stroll down memory lane.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Here you are, Trainer! Here, I've got a present for
you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I found this during the photo shoot. It's not a
jacket, but we'll still match if you wear it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After saying this, Fine Motion hands me a
clover—or a shamrock, rather.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'll continue running for as long as time permits.
I'll go as far as I can...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
With you, the person who shares my ambitions,
by my side!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pin that proof of her promise to my chest as a
way of honoring her trust and determination.
